title: Architect AW around the cheapest safe ordinary path
lane_outcome: Make AW's ordinary path the cheapest safe path by routing the #1739 parent direction into concrete child slices for phase questions, visible-surface value, residue lifecycle, continuation validation, and affordance-first state packets.
purpose_for_parent: Promote GitHub #1739 from roadmap candidate into first-class lane ownership while preserving child issues as bounded implementation slices.
technical_strategy: Start with #1740 so ordinary phase questions become the primary design unit, then use the remaining child issues to demote low-value visible surfaces, define artifact lifecycle compression, validate restart/continuation, and prefer affordance/state-packet outputs over prose-heavy instructions.
technology_choices: summary and doctor proof before lane closeout

slice_sequence.title: [Workspace]: Make ordinary phase questions the primary design unit
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Make ordinary phase questions the primary design unit before other child slices change visible surfaces, residue lifecycle, restart tests, or affordance/state-packet behavior.
slice_sequence.proof: Delivered in SYSTEM_INTENT.md, docs/package/ordinary-continuity-loop.md, docs/package/overview.md, and report_profile.ordinary_agent_path; validated by focused pytest, maintainer surfaces, workspace tests, workspace lint, summary, and planning doctor.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: Visible-surface value, lifecycle compression, restart/continuation validation, and affordance/state-packet preference remain for later child slices.

slice_sequence.title: [Workspace]: Audit and demote visible surfaces by action-changing value
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Use the phase-question model to decide which visible ordinary surfaces earn attention and which should move behind selectors, merge, or disappear.
slice_sequence.proof: Delivered by docs/package/ordinary-continuity-loop.md Visibility Disposition and report_profile.ordinary_agent_path.lane_completion_model.visibility_disposition. Low-risk demotion applied: ordinary report guidance starts from compact phase/lane packets while report detail remains behind selectors.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: None for #1741 in this lane; retained diagnostic, lifecycle, generated/reference, module, and maintainer surfaces are routed rather than first-contact.

slice_sequence.title: [Workspace]: Define lifecycle compression for AW artefacts and residue
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Make active artifacts compress into useful residue or disappear so the cheapest safe ordinary path is not burdened by stale planning state.
slice_sequence.proof: Delivered by docs/package/ordinary-continuity-loop.md Artifact Lifecycle and report_profile.ordinary_agent_path.lane_completion_model.artifact_lifecycle. Minimal survivor shape is claim boundary, proof summary, residue owner, remaining gap, and reopen trigger.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: None for #1743 in this lane; future class-specific cleanup should use the lifecycle classes instead of preserving raw active narrative.

slice_sequence.title: [Workspace]: Validate restart and continuation as core product design tests
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Treat restart and continuation as product tests for whether the ordinary path is actually cheap and safe over time.
slice_sequence.proof: Delivered by docs/package/ordinary-continuity-loop.md Restart Scenarios and report_profile.ordinary_agent_path.lane_completion_model.restart_scenarios covering direct work, known changed paths, active lane continuation, takeover/recovery, and parent-lane closeout.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: None for #1744 in this lane; failures from future scenario runs should route to owner issues with read-cost evidence.

slice_sequence.title: [Workspace]: Prefer affordances and state packets over prose instructions
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Prefer typed posture, affordances, selectors, and state packets where they reduce agent choice and reading cost more reliably than prose instructions.
slice_sequence.proof: Delivered by report_profile.ordinary_agent_path.lane_completion_model.affordance_first_rules and test coverage proving the typed packet exposes owner, proof, restart, lifecycle, and closeout checks without relying on prose-first command selection.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: None for #1745 in this lane; reasoning skills remain for semantic judgment while CLI packets own facts, routes, selectors, proof commands, and claim boundaries.

acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Aggregate child-slice proof against #1739 acceptance: updated durable architecture/ordinary-loop surfaces, mapped child ownership, representative workflow review, and honest residual-intent closeout before parent closure.

evidence: #1740 phase-question design unit implemented and validated in this branch.
#1741 visible-surface disposition implemented in ordinary-loop docs and lane_completion_model.visibility_disposition.
#1743 lifecycle compression rules implemented in ordinary-loop docs and lane_completion_model.artifact_lifecycle.
#1744 restart/continuation scenarios implemented in ordinary-loop docs and lane_completion_model.restart_scenarios.
#1745 affordance-first rules implemented in ordinary-loop docs and lane_completion_model.affordance_first_rules.

residual_lane_work: No unresolved child slices remain for this lane after PR #1805 validation; future refinements should use the recorded model and follow-up issues.
lane_to_epic_contribution: Carries the #1739 product-architecture parent lane; no child slice may claim full parent satisfaction without lane-level proof aggregation.

closeout_state.summary: All child slices for lane #1739 are implemented on PR #1805.
closeout_state.residual_work: None for this lane; PR review and merge remain.

notes: Promoted after open-issue ingestion on branch codex/ingest-prioritise-open-issues. The first active slice is #1740 because it establishes the phase-question design unit that the remaining child slices should use.
